description: Authentication service with JWT token management and user authentication
acceptance_criteria: Complete JWT authentication, password hashing, token refresh, user management

description: Policy service with advanced search functionality and business logic
acceptance_criteria: Policy CRUD operations, advanced search with 9+ criteria, audit logging, encryption

description: Claim service with policy relationships and comprehensive audit tracking
acceptance_criteria: Claim CRUD operations, policy linking, claim-level policy overrides, subrogation referrals

description: Payment service with lifecycle management structure
acceptance_criteria: Payment service class structure with method signatures

description: Security configuration and role-based access control
acceptance_criteria: JWT security, role-based access decorators, authentication dependencies

description: Global exception handling with standardized error responses
acceptance_criteria: Custom exception classes, global handlers, standardized error messages

description: Correlation ID middleware for audit logging and request tracking
acceptance_criteria: Correlation ID middleware, CORS configuration, application middleware setup

description: Complete requirements.txt with all necessary dependencies
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, authentication, payment processing, testing dependencies

description: Complete FastAPI application configuration with middleware and exception handlers
acceptance_criteria: Application entry point, middleware stack, exception handler registration
